# Narrativa

> Cinematic storytelling platform where written stories become immersive, voice-driven experiences with emotion, language switching, and AI narration.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing experience and entry into the story world.
- [Stories](/stories): Collection of cinematic story posters.
- [Author](/author): The storyteller behind Narrativa.
- [About](/about): The vision, voice, and craft behind the platform.
